case_title: LUPE SANCHEZ ET AL VS. BRIGGS DONALSON

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-15-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LUPE SANCHEZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REYNALDA SANCHEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRIGGS DONALDON IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
